title: gymnanthes pallens var. tenax
intro: Gymnanthes pallens var. tenax is a variant of the Gymnanthes pallens plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Gymnanthes pallens var. tenax include its use in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
